---
title: "The Hon. Edmund Colborne"
---

## The Hon. Edmund Colborne

**Dates:** (1824-1878)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

He married (1873) Rhoda Ellen Blogg (1843-1913) and had one daughter, (b.1876).  Rhoda (Blogg) Colborne is listed in the 1861 census as a governess and in the 1891 census as inspectress for the Education Department.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 7 th [1876]
- Letter from Decr 14th [1853]
- Letter from Oct 4th [1852]
- Letter from Wednesday 5 [December 1838]
- Letter from [?January 1837]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
